full_text:
- Transformation/Normalization: log and z-score

- There are cells (myeloid and cd4+) which are expressing both markers

- For new TMA we will get manually gated results to compare (should be
 > in a week)

- Minisom speeds up the analysis a lot → migrate

- For TMA the manual labeling didn't capture all cells based on the
 > images, as well as Tribus, so the overlap will be low sometimes

- Look into the scoring function (it's not really robust, depends on
 > the clustering if we get a weird group of cells)

- Discuss if we can use the new TMA
